WELCOME.en:
# 🤖 Rich Markdown Bot

Send any **Markdown** or **HTML** text and it will be echoed back as a rendered Rich Message.

[Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options)

Use the buttons below to explore 👇
WELCOME.hi:
# 🤖 रिच मार्कडाउन बॉट

कोई भी **Markdown** या **HTML** टेक्स्ट भेजो, वो रेंडर होकर रिच मैसेज के रूप में वापस आएगा।

[Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options)

नीचे दिए गए बटन से एक्सप्लोर करो 👇

HELP_MD.en:
# 📖 Markdown Guide

Send Markdown text and get it echoed back rendered.
Grey box = what you type ↓ result comes right after.

[Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options)
---

## Text Styles

```
**bold**  *italic*  ~~strike~~  `code`  ==marked==  ||spoiler||
```

**bold** *italic* ~~strike~~ `code` ==marked== ||spoiler||

---

## Headings

```
# Heading 1
## Heading 2
### Heading 3
#### Heading 4
##### Heading 5
###### Heading 6
```

# Heading 1
## Heading 2
### Heading 3
#### Heading 4
##### Heading 5
###### Heading 6

---

## Lists

```
- milk
- eggs
- [ ] todo
- [x] done

1. wake up
2. ship it
```

- milk
- eggs
- [ ] todo
- [x] done

1. wake up
2. ship it

---

## Unordered List (all markers)

```
- unordered list item
* unordered list item
+ unordered list item
```

- unordered list item
* unordered list item
+ unordered list item

---

## Links & Quotes

```
[Telegram](https://telegram.org)

>To be, or not to be.
```

[Telegram](https://telegram.org)

>To be, or not to be.

---

## Block Quote (multi-line)

```
>Block quotation started
>
>Block quotation continued on the next line
>Block quotation continued on the same line

>The last line of the block quotation
```

>Block quotation started
>
>Block quotation continued on the next line
>Block quotation continued on the same line

>The last line of the block quotation

---

## Divider

```
---
```

---

## Code Blocks

````
```python
print("hello")
```
````

```python
print("hello")
```

---

## Tables

```
| Lang | Speed |
|:-----|------:|
| Rust | fast  |
| Py   | comfy |
```

| Lang | Speed |
|:-----|------:|
| Rust | fast  |
| Py   | comfy |

---

## Math

```
Inline $E = mc^2$ and a block:
$$\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$
```

Inline $E = mc^2$ and a block:

$$\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$

---

## Details (Collapsible)

```
<details><summary>**Click me**</summary>
Hidden content!
</details>
```

<details><summary>**Click me**</summary>
Hidden content!
</details>

---

*Limit: up to 32,768 characters per message* ✨
HELP_MD.hi:
# 📖 Markdown गाइड

Markdown टेक्स्ट भेजो, रेंडर होकर वापस मिलेगा।
ग्रे बॉक्स = जो तुमने टाइप किया ↓ result उसके ठीक बाद आता है।

[Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options)
---

## टेक्स्ट स्टाइल

```
**bold**  *italic*  ~~strike~~  `code`  ==marked==  ||spoiler||
```

**bold** *italic* ~~strike~~ `code` ==marked== ||spoiler||

---

## हेडिंग्स

```
# Heading 1
## Heading 2
### Heading 3
#### Heading 4
##### Heading 5
###### Heading 6
```

# Heading 1
## Heading 2
### Heading 3
#### Heading 4
##### Heading 5
###### Heading 6

---

## लिस्ट्स

```
- milk
- eggs
- [ ] todo
- [x] done

1. wake up
2. ship it
```

- milk
- eggs
- [ ] todo
- [x] done

1. wake up
2. ship it

---

## अनऑर्डर्ड लिस्ट (सभी मार्कर)

```
- unordered list item
* unordered list item
+ unordered list item
```

- unordered list item
* unordered list item
+ unordered list item

---

## लिंक्स और कोट्स

```
[Telegram](https://telegram.org)

>To be, or not to be.
```

[Telegram](https://telegram.org)

>To be, or not to be.

---

## ब्लॉक कोट (मल्टी-लाइन)

```
>Block quotation started
>
>Block quotation continued on the next line
>Block quotation continued on the same line

>The last line of the block quotation
```

>Block quotation started
>
>Block quotation continued on the next line
>Block quotation continued on the same line

>The last line of the block quotation

---

## डिवाइडर

```
---
```

---

## कोड ब्लॉक्स

````
```python
print("hello")
```
````

```python
print("hello")
```

---

## टेबल्स

```
| Lang | Speed |
|:-----|------:|
| Rust | fast  |
| Py   | comfy |
```

| Lang | Speed |
|:-----|------:|
| Rust | fast  |
| Py   | comfy |

---

## मैथ

```
Inline $E = mc^2$ and a block:
$$\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$
```

Inline $E = mc^2$ and a block:

$$\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$

---

## Details (कोलैप्सिबल)

```
<details><summary>**Click me**</summary>
Hidden content!
</details>
```

<details><summary>**Click me**</summary>
Hidden content!
</details>

---

*लिमिट: हर मैसेज में अधिकतम 32,768 characters* ✨

# 🌐 HTML Guide If your message starts with `<`, the bot renders it as HTML. [Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options) --- ## Text Styles ``` bold italic underline strike code marked spoiler superscript subscript ``` bold italic underline strike code marked spoiler sup sub --- ## Headings ```

Heading 1

Heading 2

Heading 3

Heading 4

Heading 3
```

Heading 1

Heading 2

Heading 3

Heading 4

Heading 3
--- ## Lists ```
  • milk
  • eggs
  1. wake up
  2. ship it
  • done
  • todo
```
  • milk
  • eggs
  1. wake up
  2. ship it
  • done
  • todo
--- ## Links & Quotes ``` Telegram
Quote textAuthor
Pull quoteThe Author
``` Telegram
Quote textAuthor
Pull quoteThe Author
--- ## Superscript & Subscript ``` subscript text superscript text ``` Normal text with subscript text and superscript text --- ## Footnotes ``` Text with a reference[^id1] and another one[^id2]. [^id1]: Definition of the first footnote. [^id2]: Definition of the second footnote. ``` Text with a reference[^id1] and another one[^id2]. [^id1]: Definition of the first footnote. [^id2]: Definition of the second footnote. --- ## Code ``` 
print("hello")
``` 
print("hello")
--- ## Table ```
LangSpeed
Rustfast
Pycomfy
```
LangSpeed
Rustfast
Pycomfy
--- ## Math ``` x^2 + y^2 E = mc^2 ``` x^2 + y^2 E = mc^2 --- ## Details (Collapsible) ```
TitleContent here
```
TitleContent here
--- *Send some HTML and watch it render* ✨

HELP_MEDIA.en: # 🖼 Media Guide Use Markdown image syntax to embed media in Rich Messages. The URL file extension determines the media type rendered. [Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options) --- ## Map ``` ``` --- ## Photo ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg) --- ## Video ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4) --- ## Audio ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3) --- ## Voice Note (ogg) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg) --- ## Animation (gif) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif) --- ## Media with Captions ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg "Photo caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4 "Video caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3 "Audio caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg "Voice note caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif "Animation caption") ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg "Photo caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4 "Video caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3 "Audio caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg "Voice note caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif "Animation caption") --- ## Slideshow (Combined) ``` ``` --- *URL extension = media type: jpg/png=photo · mp4=video · mp3=audio · ogg=voice · gif=animation* ✨
HELP_MEDIA.hi: # 🖼 मीडिया गाइड Rich Message में मीडिया डालने के लिए Markdown की image syntax use करो। URL की file extension से पता चलता है कौन सा मीडिया टाइप रेंडर होगा। [Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options) --- ## मैप ``` ``` --- ## फोटो ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg) --- ## वीडियो ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4) --- ## ऑडियो ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3) --- ## वॉइस नोट (ogg) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg) --- ## एनिमेशन (gif) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif) ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif) --- ## कैप्शन के साथ मीडिया ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg "Photo caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4 "Video caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3 "Audio caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg "Voice note caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif "Animation caption") ``` ![](https://telegram.org/example/photo.jpg "Photo caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/video.mp4 "Video caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.mp3 "Audio caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/audio.ogg "Voice note caption") ![](https://telegram.org/example/animation.gif "Animation caption") --- ## स्लाइडशो (कॉम्बाइंड) ``` ``` --- *URL extension = मीडिया टाइप: jpg/png=फोटो · mp4=वीडियो · mp3=ऑडियो · ogg=वॉइस · gif=एनिमेशन* ✨

DEMO.en:
# 🎨 Full Demo — Live Output Sample This message demonstrates every supported feature rendered live. [Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options) --- ## Text Styles **bold** *italic* ~~strike~~ `code` ==marked== ||spoiler|| underline super sub --- ## Nested Formatting **Bold _italic underlined italic bold italic_ bold** >Quote with **bold**, ~~strikethrough~~, and ||spoiler||, plus [a link](https://t.me/). --- ## Lists - Item with `inline code` and **bold** - Item with ~~strikethrough~~ and ==highlight== - [ ] Task todo - [x] Task done 1. First 2. Second 3. Third --- ## Code Block ```python def greet(name: str) -> str: return f"Hello, {name}!" print(greet("Telegram")) ``` --- ## Table | Metric | Value | Status | |:--------|:----------:|---------:| | Speed | **42** ms | ==fast== | | Memory | 128 MB | ==ok== | | Uptime | 99.9% | ~~down~~ | --- ## Math Inline: $E = mc^2$ and $x^2 + y^2 = r^2$ $$\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}$$ --- ## Details (Collapsible)
**More details — click me** ### Inside Details - **Markdown** works inside details - Tables, code, lists all supported | Key | Value | |:----|------:| | A | 1 | | B | 2 | ```js console.log("inside details!"); ```
--- ## Media — Combined Slideshow --- [GitHub](https://github.com/wwwlbs22) •|• [𝐌 𝚲 𝐗 𝐎](https://t.me/unexceo) •|• [𝐌 𝚲 𝐗 𝐎](https://t.me/unexceo)
DEMO.hi:
# 🎨 फुल डेमो — लाइव आउटपुट सैंपल यह मैसेज हर सपोर्टेड फीचर को लाइव रेंडर करके दिखाता है। [Rich Markdown Telegram](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options) --- ## टेक्स्ट स्टाइल **bold** *italic* ~~strike~~ `code` ==marked== ||spoiler|| underline super sub --- ## नेस्टेड फॉर्मेटिंग **Bold _italic underlined italic bold italic_ bold** >Quote with **bold**, ~~strikethrough~~, and ||spoiler||, plus [a link](https://t.me/). --- ## लिस्ट्स - Item with `inline code` and **bold** - Item with ~~strikethrough~~ and ==highlight== - [ ] Task todo - [x] Task done 1. First 2. Second 3. Third --- ## कोड ब्लॉक ```python def greet(name: str) -> str: return f"Hello, {name}!" print(greet("Telegram")) ``` --- ## टेबल | Metric | Value | Status | |:--------|:----------:|---------:| | Speed | **42** ms | ==fast== | | Memory | 128 MB | ==ok== | | Uptime | 99.9% | ~~down~~ | --- ## मैथ Inline: $E = mc^2$ and $x^2 + y^2 = r^2$ $$\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}$$ --- ## Details (कोलैप्सिबल)
**More details — click me** ### Details के अंदर - Details के अंदर **Markdown** काम करता है - Tables, code, lists सब सपोर्टेड हैं | Key | Value | |:----|------:| | A | 1 | | B | 2 | ```js console.log("inside details!"); ```
--- ## मीडिया — कॉम्बाइंड स्लाइडशो --- [GitHub](https://github.com/wwwlbs22) •|• [𝐌 𝚲 𝐗 𝐎](https://t.me/unexceo) •|• [𝐌 𝚲 𝐗 𝐎](https://t.me/unexceo)

HELP_ADV.en: # 🧩 Advanced 10.1 Guide Extra *Rich Message* building blocks added in Bot API 10.1, beyond the basics. --- ## Subscript / Superscript ``` H2O and x2 ``` H2O and x2 --- ## Highlight / Marked ``` ==important== ``` ==important== --- ## Footnotes & References ``` Rich Messages were introduced in Bot API 10.1[^1]. [^1]: See the official changelog for details. ``` Rich Messages were introduced in Bot API 10.1[^1]. [^1]: See the official changelog for details. *A `[^id]` marker becomes a clickable reference; a matching `[^id]: text` line becomes a footer note.* --- ## Anchors (jump links) ``` [Jump to section](#section-1) ## Section 1 ``` *Lets long rich messages link to a spot further down the same message.* --- ## Pull Quote ``` The single most important line in this message.— Author ``` The single most important line in this message.— Author --- ## Collage (grid of media) ``` ``` --- ## Streaming replies (`sendRichMessageDraft`) Bots can stream a rich reply piece by piece — like an AI typing — using `sendRichMessageDraft`, then lock it in with one final `sendRichMessage` call. Try the **⚡ Streaming Demo** button on the main menu to see it live. --- ## `skip_entity_detection` Pass `skip_entity_detection: true` inside `InputRichMessage` to stop Telegram from auto-linkifying plain URLs, @mentions, #hashtags, emails, phone numbers and bank card numbers inside your rich text. --- *Tag names such as ``, `` and `` follow Telegram's existing `tg-*` convention (``, ``, ``, ``). Since Rich Messages just shipped, double-check exact tag behavior against the [official docs](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-messages) as Telegram refines them.*
HELP_ADV.hi: # 🧩 एडवांस्ड 10.1 गाइड Bot API 10.1 में आए *Rich Message* के एक्स्ट्रा ब्लॉक्स, बेसिक्स से आगे। --- ## सबस्क्रिप्ट / सुपरस्क्रिप्ट ``` H2O and x2 ``` H2O and x2 --- ## हाइलाइट ``` ==important== ``` ==important== --- ## फुटनोट्स और रेफरेंस ``` Rich Messages were introduced in Bot API 10.1[^1]. [^1]: See the official changelog for details. ``` Rich Messages were introduced in Bot API 10.1[^1]. [^1]: See the official changelog for details. *`[^id]` मार्कर एक क्लिकेबल reference बन जाता है; matching `[^id]: text` लाइन footer note बन जाती है।* --- ## एंकर्स (जंप लिंक्स) ``` [Jump to section](#section-1) ## Section 1 ``` *लंबे rich message में उसी मैसेज के किसी नीचे वाले हिस्से का लिंक देने देता है।* --- ## पुल कोट ``` The single most important line in this message.— Author ``` The single most important line in this message.— Author --- ## कोलाज (मीडिया ग्रिड) ``` ``` --- ## स्ट्रीमिंग रिप्लाई (`sendRichMessageDraft`) बॉट्स `sendRichMessageDraft` का use करके एक rich reply टुकड़ों में स्ट्रीम कर सकते हैं — जैसे AI टाइप कर रहा हो — फिर आखिर में एक `sendRichMessage` कॉल से उसे लॉक कर देते हैं। मेन मेनू पर **⚡ स्ट्रीमिंग डेमो** बटन दबाकर लाइव देखो। --- ## `skip_entity_detection` `InputRichMessage` के अंदर `skip_entity_detection: true` पास करो ताकि तुम्हारे rich text में मौजूद URLs, @mentions, #hashtags, ईमेल, फोन नंबर और बैंक कार्ड नंबर को टेलीग्राम अपने आप लिंक न बनाए। --- *``, `` और `` जैसे tag नाम टेलीग्राम के पुराने `tg-*` पैटर्न को फॉलो करते हैं (``, ``, ``, ``)। चूंकि Rich Messages अभी-अभी लॉन्च हुआ है, exact tag behavior [official docs](https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-messages) से एक बार जरूर चेक कर लेना।*

final.en:
# ⚡ Streaming Demo — Done

This message was built with several `sendRichMessageDraft` calls and then **locked in** with one final `sendRichMessage` call.

- draft 1 → draft 2 → draft 3 ✅
- Drafts are an ephemeral ~30s preview only
- The final `sendRichMessage` is what actually gets saved to the chat

*Great for streaming long AI-generated answers without spamming edits.*
final.hi:
# ⚡ स्ट्रीमिंग डेमो — पूरा हुआ

ये मैसेज कई `sendRichMessageDraft` कॉल्स से बना, फिर आखिर में एक `sendRichMessage` कॉल से **लॉक** हुआ।

- draft 1 → draft 2 → draft 3 ✅
- Drafts सिर्फ एक अस्थायी ~30 सेकंड का preview होते हैं
- असली `sendRichMessage` ही चैट में save होता है
